name: Week 5 KB Conditioning (Thursday Refine — Light)
description: Movement practice, not a workout. Light bells, low volume, zero leg loading. Legs day is tomorrow. Drill the OTD flow and skill movements at easy weights. Get in, get smooth, get out in 20 minutes.

exercises.notes: Light bell. Just loosen up the shoulders.

sets.name: Block 1: OTD Flow (Easy)

exercises.notes: Light and easy — don't sit in the hole.
Easy range, don't push depth today.
20lb makes this feel like nothing. Focus on the path.
Controlled descent. Complete one side, then switch.

sets.notes: OTD flow at 20lb — lighter than Tuesday. 2 rounds each side, do the whole flow twice. This should feel effortless. You're polishing the pattern, not building it.

exercises.notes: 20-25lb. If Tuesday's 30lb went well, use 25 here max. This is about the groove, not the load.
18-20lb. Light. Deep hip hinge, eyes on the bell, zero grinding.
25lb — lighter than Tuesday's 30. Drill the transitions. Pause at each checkpoint for a full breath. Left side: own every position before moving to the next.

tips: This is NOT a workout. It's movement practice. 20 minutes, light bells, zero intensity.
Legs day is tomorrow. No swings, no C&P, no squats, no lunges, no finisher. Nothing that loads the legs.
OTD flow at 20lb should feel like a warm-up. If it feels like work, the bell is too heavy.
Bent press and windmill: you're greasing the groove, not testing limits.
TGU at 25lb is about transitions, not strength. Pause everywhere. Breathe.
Do not get inspired. Do not add sets. Do not grab the 50. You will regret it tomorrow under a barbell.
